summary: Chaos testing reveals a high error rate and latency increase for the `/products` route, indicating potential issues with distributed system resilience.

patterns.description: Error spike observed on `/products` (GET) route during chaos testing

recommendations.title: Investigate and remediate error causes
recommendations.description: Review logs and performance metrics to identify root causes of errors on `/products` route. Implement fixes and re-run chaos testing to validate improvements.

anomalies.description: High request volume may indicate scaling or performance issues. Monitor and adjust resources as needed.
High error rate on `/products` route may indicate distributed system resilience issues. Investigate and remediate.
